generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Implements TwinLight project's lighting control actuators for adaptive lighting systems in the building infrastructure, interfaced via Eclipse Hono for real-time bidirectional communication with the DT"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated actuator for energy efficiency optimization using reinforcement learning from BOREALIS project, configured via BIM-centric control framework"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PostOccupancyLightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor network embedded in building for real-time lighting conditions monitoring, configured with tenant IDs and endpoint addresses from BIM metadata"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingConditionData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network measuring energy consumption metrics (kWh, kWh/m²) with feedback to BOREALIS reinforcement learning system for optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageData
]

instance VisualComfortSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring visual comfort metrics (e.g., glare levels, luminance distribution) to inform adaptive lighting control policies"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualComfortMetrics
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy detection sensors with BIM-based endpoint configuration for space utilization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyPatterns
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building environmental sensors embedded in BIM model for real-time temperature monitoring with runtime metadata extraction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance LightingConditionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyLightingSensor
]

instance EnergyUsageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance VisualComfortMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VisualComfortSensor
]

instance OccupancyPatterns : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

// C5: Data
instance BIMGeometryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Static building geometry and topology data derived from BIM models for spatial reference in the DT"
]

instance SensorConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata extracted from BIM models defining sensor configurations (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) for device modeling"
]

instance RealTimeLightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting state data (on/off, brightness levels) transmitted via Eclipse Ditto for bidirectional synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingConditionData
]

instance RealTimeEnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics (kWh, kWh/m²) processed through BOREALIS reinforcement learning for optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyUsageData
]

instance RealTimeComfortData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time visual comfort metrics processed for adaptive lighting control policies"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualComfortMetrics
]

instance OccupancyAnalyticsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy pattern analysis derived from sensor data for space utilization optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyPatterns
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental temperature data synchronized with BIM-based building model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureData
]

// C10: Models
instance BIMBuildingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Core BIM model of the LEED Platinum academic building serving as foundation for DT creation, enriched with runtime semantics"
]

instance OperationalDTModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime operational model combining static BIM geometry with real-time sensor data for end-to-end automation"
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven control logic framework implementing adaptive lighting and energy optimization algorithms"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating BIM-to-DT transformations using MDE principles for model enrichment with runtime semantics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform enabling real-time bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and DT via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization platform for bidirectional data flow between physical sensors/actuators and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization environment for real-time building condition monitoring and interactive simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides immersive visualization of building conditions via Unreal Engine 5 for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements BOREALIS reinforcement learning for energy efficiency optimization via predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service for adaptive lighting control based on visual comfort metrics and occupancy patterns"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performance monitoring service detecting faults in building systems via real-time sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAction
]

instance PerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates building performance under various operational conditions for decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance DataSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures bidirectional data flow between physical sensors/actuators and DT via Eclipse Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataConsistencyAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ImmersiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building conditions for immersive monitoring via Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive energy optimization recommendations using BOREALIS reinforcement learning algorithms"
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adaptive lighting control commands sent to actuators based on visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated fault detection and isolation commands for building systems based on performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive performance simulations of building systems under different operational scenarios"
]

instance DataConsistencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated synchronization actions to maintain consistency between physical and virtual building states"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Proactive maintenance scheduling recommendations derived from performance monitoring and fault detection"
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time operational adjustments based on predictive analytics and performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightActuator, EnergyOptimizationActuator,
                 PostOccupancyLightingSensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                 VisualComfortSensor, OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor,
                 RealTimeLightingData, RealTimeEnergyData,
                 RealTimeComfortData, OccupancyAnalyticsData,
                 EnvironmentalData
]

instance AcademicBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "LEED Platinum academic building environment with specialized DT services for research and operational optimization"
    base:contains BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment, PerformanceSimulationService,
                 DataSynchronizationService, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs via **standardized extension points** in its modular architecture, enabling bidirectional communication with physical systems. Control signals (e.g., actuator commands, lighting schedules) are transmitted back to the building infrastructure through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, ensuring seamless integration with BCS. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing adjustments without redeployment, thus maintaining operational continuity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with real-time synchronization, ensuring live updates between physical and virtual representations with minimal latency. The Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric evaluates the fidelity of the DT, emphasizing its alignment with physical conditions. While the exact time rates are not specified, the system supports sub-second synchronization for critical operational data, enabling responsive decision-making and control actions within milliseconds to seconds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of:
  - A **centralized DT core** (hosted on a scalable platform) managing bidirectional communication with physical assets via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**.
  - **Modular services** (e.g., visualization, analytics) deployed as plug-ins, enabling extensibility.
  - **BIM as the semantic backbone**, ensuring unified interpretation of building components across disciplines.
  - **Living Lab case study** as the reference implementation, demonstrating interoperability with existing AECO systems (e.g., BIM, IoT platforms). The architecture supports **service-oriented orchestration**, allowing dynamic composition of DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all lifecycle stages** of the building: **design** (BIM-based modeling), **construction** (device integration), and **operation** (real-time monitoring and control). It covers representations from **as-designed** (ideal BIM models) to **as-operated** (live sensor data), ensuring alignment with physical conditions. The framework automates transitions between phases, reducing manual intervention while maintaining interoperability with legacy systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework ensures **semantic coherence** by extracting structured metadata from BIM models, reducing **semantic drift** (e.g., via automated synchronization with sensor data). Validation mechanisms include:
  - **Model validation** (e.g., BIM clash detection).
  - **Runtime drift detection** (e.g., anomaly detection in sensor data).
  The DT’s validity is maintained through **real-time data synchronization** and **modular service updates**, ensuring accuracy across lifecycle stages."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT uses Eclipse Hono and Ditto as middleware for bidirectional communication, enabling MQTT-based protocols for real-time data exchange. The technical connection supports cloud-based or edge computing deployments, ensuring scalability and resilience. The system integrates with BIM models to extract device metadata (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) for automated configuration. While specific network architectures are not detailed, the focus is on seamless synchronization between physical and virtual components via standardized interfaces."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via a **model-driven pipeline**:
  1. **BIM Model Input**: Enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor IDs, control logic) via MDE.
  2. **Middleware Integration**: Connects to **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for real-time data exchange.
  3. **Visualization Layer**: Deployed in **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive monitoring.
  4. **Modular Hosting**: Services are deployed as plug-ins, with the core DT hosted on a scalable infrastructure (e.g., cloud/edge). The framework supports **automated redeployment** of services without disrupting operations."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates with BIM-centric workflows for device modeling and control logic configuration. Eclipse Ditto enables interoperability with IoT platforms for real-time data exchange. While the framework does not explicitly mention proprietary tools like Revit or ArchiCAD, it emphasizes BIM standards as the semantic backbone. Horizontal integration supports external systems via standardized extension points, ensuring compatibility with broader AECO ecosystems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to AECO-specific standards such as Building Information Modeling (BIM) as its semantic foundation. While specific standards like IFC or COBie are not explicitly mentioned, the framework leverages BIM as a unified framework for modeling and deployment. The emphasis is on interoperability and modularity to support scalable DT engineering in the AECO domain."
]
